hypothesis: E13 smoke comparator: a medication-only component can parse and preserve annotated current-Rx outputs on a capped ExECT validation slice without emitting diagnosis or seizure-type labels.
metric_caveats: E13 capped smoke only; not a full-validation performance estimate.
Annotated medication is the sole scored endpoint for the E13 decision; diagnosis and seizure-type outputs are intentionally empty for this component arm.
Use the medication-family slice of exect_field_family_deterministic_v1 for AM-only versus AM+MT comparison.
Lifecycle and temporality are not benchmark-facing medication targets.
Validation is the component-development split; holdout rows from E11 remain residual evidence only and must not tune prompts, scorers, loaders, splits, bridges, or repairs.
